heading: Penalty for use of unlawful towline
label: 153 Penalty for use of unlawful towline
text: The master of the towing vessel shall be liable to the suspension or revocation of his license for any willful violation of regulations issued pursuant to in the manner prescribed for incompetency, misconduct, or unskillfulness.section 152 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , which comprises a major part of this chapter.act June 7, 1897, ch. 430 Stat. 96
